changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE plugin_configuration SET properties = ( SELECT jsonb_set( properties::jsonb, '{verzoekProperties}', jsonb_agg( jsonb_set( elem - 'caseDefinitionName', '{caseDefinitionKey}', elem->'caseDefinitionName', true ) ) )::json FROM jsonb_array_elements((plugin_configuration.properties::jsonb)->'verzoekProperties') elem ) WHERE (properties::jsonb)->'verzoekProperties' IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE plugin_configuration d INNER JOIN ( SELECT c.plugin_configuration_id, JSON_SET( c.properties, '$.verzoekProperties', JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_REMOVE( JSON_SET( vp.verzoek_property, '$.caseDefinitionKey', JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(vp.verzoek_property, '$.caseDefinitionName')) ), '$.caseDefinitionName' ) ) ) AS new_props FROM plugin_configuration c, JSON_TABLE(c.properties, '$.verzoekProperties[*]' COLUMNS ( verzoek_property JSON PATH '$' ) ) vp GROUP BY c.plugin_configuration_id ) b ON d.plugin_configuration_id = b.plugin_configuration_id SET d.properties = b.new_props;
